item.title: Things you might want to know
item.description: If you didn't know you wanted to know, now you know. Please double-check if necessary. Don't believe everything that's on the interwebs. :) Have a great day everyone!

item.title: No wonder men hide emotions.
item.description: Yes, we tell men its ok to show emotions, but most times when they do, it ends badly for them. Even alot of women who claim to want an emotional man wont stay with an emotional man once they found one.
item.dc:creator: Raoul9753

item.title: 140 kg (48% fat) - 86 kg (12-13% fat)
item.description: 6-7 years in the making. Turning 49 on March 31st. Never ever give up! P.S I do use Snapchat if people want to see my fitness journey. Username is ace1973 or Instagram: robertoficeland :) Thank for all the comments. It's nice to see a decent community who supports one another! :)

item.title: Republicans do NOT support veterans. Period.
item.description: The Honoring Our PACT Act, a bill to provide benefits for veterans affected by burnpit and other toxic exposure was passed in the House of Representatives, March 3, 2022. It was passed 256 to 174. 174 Republicans voted against it. Republicans use veterans only as campaign props. They don't actually support us.
item.dc:creator: galactictaco

item.title: Every year, local communities on both sides of the Apurimac River Canyon rebuild the Q'eswachaka Bridge
item.description: The old bridge is torn down and the new bridge is built in just three days using traditional Inka engineering techniques. Full video: https://youtu.be/dql-D6JQ1Bc

item.title: Easiest friction fire I've ever done!
item.description: I just recently learned of this technique after years of teaching friction fires and I have to say that it's the easiest method I've ever used personally. I cut a lot out in order to make this less than a minute but from start of friction application to flame was under a minute. I've gotten 48 second flames from bow drill before but it was MUCH more effort. I hope you guys enjoy! Most Viral Edit: Thank you so much for being interested in this one!!! I really enjoyed making this and if you are interested in seeing more of my stuff please check out our channel: https://www.youtube.com/followthecompassnorth There will be a hand made (by me) Damascus (layered steel) knife giveaway this summer and I answer every question on every YT video so you can consider me your own personal survival resource!
item.dc:creator: LiberalViking

item.title: Price gouging
item.description: $4.11 is about $5.22 in 2022 dollars. I am seeing gas at $4.30 in my neighborhood. California current avg, regular = $5.740, premium = $6.068, diesel = $6.290 (from the comments)

item.dc:creator: macturlock

item.title: I’m one of the burn pit veterans
item.description: As a Marine Corps veteran who was directly exposed on two of my deployments, this disgusts me. My first deployment (2008) we had to burn our own pit only 75yds from our living area for trash and human waste, as in I was part of working parties that lit our own pits. On my second deployment (2010-2011) we were only 100yds away. I struggle with constant sinusitis, breathing issues, and it just keeps getting worse. How can this be a partisan issue? How is this even a question of support? These are rhetorical questions, I know why. But still, I don't understand how someone can look at themselves in the mirror every morning and feel good about voting against. Source: https://www.congress.gov/bill/117th-congress/house-bill/3967 Source: https://www.govtrack.us/congress/votes/117-2022/h57 Edit: Damn, Most Viral? Thank you all so much. Don't send anything, just vote... please.
item.dc:creator: swc0806

item.title: I made it past boards
item.description: After 2 long years of nursing school with enough time to get 1 other degree, an adaptive test that can go anywhere from 75-145 questions, I have done it. Thank you Imgur for all the memes and inspirational posts. I hope everyone has a wonderful time today.
